example_project.name: SaaS Idea Manager
example_project.note: This .vibekb content models a small, realistic example application so every VibeKB V1 view can be demonstrated. The example app's source files (public/, src/, migrations/) are described, not shipped in this repository. Provenance fields reflect how each fact would be established for a real project.

structure.project: project/ — identity, intent, current state, constraints
structure.system: system/ — mental model, components, flows, storage, deployment
structure.memory: memory/ — decisions, constraints, assumptions, warnings, discoveries, changes
structure.work: work/ — current AI work, handoff, sessions
